'''ngathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobately|lobately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobately|lobately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngathate|ngathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngathatesher|ngathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathatesherĂ«m|ngathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngathatero|ngathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngathateshĂ«|ngathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathateshĂ«m|ngathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingathatero|gokingathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingathateshĂ«|gokingathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathateshĂ«m|gokingathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongathankerom|gongathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongathankeshĂ«|gongathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathankeshĂ«m|gongathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongathankeya|gongathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngathaterom|ngathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathatemu|ngathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngathateya|ngathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingathaterom|gokingathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathatemu|gokingathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingathateya|gokingathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngathathate|ngathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngathathatesher|ngathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathathatesherĂ«m|ngathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngathathatero|ngathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngathathateshĂ«|ngathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathathateshĂ«m|ngathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingathathatero|gokingathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingathathateshĂ«|gokingathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathathateshĂ«m|gokingathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongathathankerom|gongathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongathathankeshĂ«|gongathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathathankeshĂ«m|gongathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongathathankeya|gongathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngathathaterom|ngathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathathatemu|ngathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngathathateya|ngathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingathathaterom|gokingathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathathatemu|gokingathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingathathateya|gokingathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠte|ngĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠtesher|ngĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠtero|ngĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠthĂŠtero|gokingĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠterom|ngĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠtemu|ngĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠthĂŠteya|ngĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠthĂŠterom|gokingĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠthĂŠteya|gokingĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafthafte|ngafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafthaftesher|ngafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafthaftesherĂ«m|ngafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafthaftero|ngafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafthafteshĂ«|ngafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafthafteshĂ«m|ngafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafthaftero|gokingafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafthafteshĂ«|gokingafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafthafteshĂ«m|gokingafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafthafnkerom|gongafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafthafnkeshĂ«|gongafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafthafnkeshĂ«m|gongafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafthafnkeya|gongafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafthafterom|ngafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafthaftemu|ngafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafthafteya|ngafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafthafterom|gokingafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafthaftemu|gokingafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafthafteya|gokingafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
